skills.name: install-toolkit
skills.description: Guides the user through installing tw-ai-toolkit into a consumer repository.

parameters.name: repo_path
parameters.description: Absolute or relative path to the consumer repo root (defaults to current directory)

parameters.name: version
parameters.description: Toolkit version tag to install (e.g. v1.0.0). Defaults to latest stable tag.

skills.name: lint-component
skills.description: Validates that a toolkit component follows all required conventions and schema rules.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: Relative path to the component directory (e.g. skills/lint-component)

skills.name: python-test-governor
skills.description: Audits Python unit test coverage, maps production modules to tests, classifies gaps by severity, and generates a structured governance report with actionable remediation decisions.

parameters.name: base_ref
parameters.description: Git ref to diff against (e.g. origin/main). When provided, the report focuses on changed modules.

parameters.name: coverage_xml
parameters.description: Path to coverage.xml generated by coverage.py. Enables per-module coverage signals.

parameters.name: test_results_dir
parameters.description: Directory containing pytest JUnit XML output for failing test detection.

skills.name: python-test-remediator
skills.description: Consumes a Python test governance report, assigns coverage tiers per module, then generates or updates maintainable pytest and unittest tests to meet tiered line-coverage targets.

parameters.name: report_file
parameters.description: Path to the governance report file produced by /tw-python-test-governor. If omitted, Claude will look for the most recent TEST_GOVERNANCE_REPORT_*.md in the project root.

parameters.name: base_ref
parameters.description: Git ref used by /tw-python-test-governor (e.g. origin/main). Passed to the inventory script to regenerate the report when no report file is provided.

skills.name: sync-context
skills.description: Regenerates the toolkit registry and context snapshots from current component files.

parameters.name: force
parameters.description: Force regeneration even if no component files appear to have changed

agents.name: onboard-repo
agents.description: Analyzes a repository and sets up tw-ai-toolkit with configuration tailored to the project.

agents.name: scaffold-component
agents.description: Creates a new toolkit component from the appropriate template given a type and name.

rules.name: claude-base
rules.description: Base behavioral rules for Claude Code when working in a repo that uses tw-ai-toolkit.

rules.name: cursor-base
rules.description: Base behavioral rules for Cursor when working in a repo that uses tw-ai-toolkit.

mcp_servers.name: tw-github
mcp_servers.description: GitHub MCP server exposing PR, issue, and repository tools to AI assistants.

mcp_servers.name: tw-jira
mcp_servers.description: Jira MCP server exposing issue, sprint, and project tools to AI assistants.
